programs.title: Bloomberg Businessweek Daily
programs.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring you reporting from the magazine that helps global leaders stay ahead, plus insight on the people, companies and trends shaping today's complex economy.

programs.title: Bloomberg The Close
programs.desc: Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld break down the day's top market-moving stories and trading action around the closing bell.

programs.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programs.desc: Bloomberg Balance of Power focuses on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.

programs.title: The Deal with Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programs.desc: AJ Andrews on baseball's momentum, softball's growth and why storytelling and authenticity are key to building the next generation of fans.

programs.title: The Deal with Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programs.desc: Three-time Super Bowl champion Steve Young discusses the challenges faced and lessons learned on his journey from the NFL to managing a $10 billion fund.

programs.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programs.desc: Live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping markets.
